flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 27% at University of Arkansas Hope-Texarkana vs the 2018–2022 baseline (697 vs 953).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Arkansas Hope-Texarkana rose 27% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.4k → $5.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Arkansas Hope-Texarkana rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.1k → $3.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Arkansas Hope-Texarkana fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (760 → 583).
